title: amaranthus paraganensis
intro: Amaranthus paraganensis, also known as Bhui Amaranth or Bhui Amla, is a type of flowering plant in the amaranth family. This plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Amaranthus paraganensis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and lowering blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, powder, and oil, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
